validation_gates.reason: Repository, immutable base, target blob, existing package path, two-file change budget, review-branch route, and non-goals were resolved before mutation.

Existing packages/redaction placement and document identity were retained. Directory Rules, package/source/namespace boundaries, open pull requests, and matching branches were checked; no parallel authority or ADR trigger was introduced.
Main was rechecked at 5cf7386b17a85feeadbb82a0eb9ec92bded68279 and the target blob remained 0003edfa3ac8de43d50f9b8ca72da356b9e534d0 before branch creation.

Direct reads confirmed kfm-redaction version 0.0.0, incomplete subpackage metadata, merged source and namespace README v1.1 boundaries, an empty __init__.py, and a comment-only core.py. Bounded search established no functional consumer import or package-test reference.

The README adds package ownership, packaging/build/import/API, documentation-layer separation, bounded vocabulary, profile activation, deterministic candidate behavior, dependency direction, lifecycle, security/privacy, supply chain, resource limits, telemetry, consumers, tests, staged implementation, definition of done, verification, compatibility, correction, revocation, and rollback contracts.

The final README has one H1, 75 headings with no hierarchy jumps or duplicate slugs, 65 resolved internal links, balanced code fences, no trailing whitespace, a parseable KFM Meta Block, and a final newline.
All nineteen repository-relative documentation and authority links resolve to files verified in this session at the pinned repository lineage.
The change includes no credentials, restricted source payloads, real living-person or genomic data, protected coordinates, transform secrets, or release/publication action.

GitHub returned README blob c100eb332db3aba02395c1423b108005cb9bd5ed on commit 940182e81639dd1d3e8144e591090d448c0552ec, matching the locally recomputed Git blob SHA and declared SHA-256 artifact hash.

The connector exposes serialized Contents API writes rather than an expected-head atomic multi-file operation. README and receipt will be written sequentially on a scoped review branch with remote read-back and final diff verification.
The redaction package remains a greenfield placeholder and the API-only workflow did not clone or execute repository code. Pull-request checks are observed separately.
Human review remains pending and separate from generation and static validation.
